name: Stir-n-Roll Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, salt, and milk. Stir in 1/4 cup salad oil until well combined.
3. Knead the dough with your hands ten times to make it smooth.
4. Divide the dough into two equal pieces.
5. On a lightly floured, cloth-covered board, roll each piece of dough into a 13-inch circle.
6. Transfer each rolled-out dough to a pizza pan or baking sheet. Turn up the edges about half an inch by pinching or pleating.
7. Brush the pizzas with 2 tablespoons salad oil.
8. Add your desired pizza toppings.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes, then cut into wedges and serve.
